svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" pages="2"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="35oM_rR_bfFPD_YD9n2v"> <mxGraphModel dx="2577" dy="-2997" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml
skinparam componentStyle uml2
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF

package \"Interface Utilisateur\" {
 [UI (Web)] as UI
}

package \"Cœur de l'Application (Script)\" #LightCyan {
 [Contrôleur Principal] as Orchestrateur
 [Moteur de Scraping] as Scraper
 [Module d'Enrichissement] as Enricher
 [Module de Qualification (IA)] as Scorer
 [Connecteur CRM] as CRMConnector
}

database \"Stockage Local / Cache\" {
 [Fichiers JSON/CSV] as Cache
}

cloud \"Services Externes\" #GhostWhite {
 interface \"HTTP/Web\" as WebInter
 interface \"API Enrichment\" as APIExt
 interface \"API LLM\" as APILlm
 interface \"API HubSpot\" as APIHub
}

' Relations
UI --> Orchestrateur : \"Lance le processus\"
Orchestrateur --> Scraper
Orchestrateur --> Enricher
Orchestrateur --> Scorer
Orchestrateur --> CRMConnector

Scraper --( WebInter : \"Extraction données\"
Enricher --( APIExt : \"Clearbit / INSEE\"
Scorer --( APILlm : \"OpenAI / Anthropic\"
CRMConnector --( APIHub : \"HubSpot API\"

Orchestrateur ..> Cache : \"Persistance temporaire\"

@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="ZIn7y10KS4S6IeKaEMli-5"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="573" width="1116" x="272.5" y="4500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> <diagram id="eeFQFExwc3SaGkRoiD7q" name="Page-2"> <mxGraphModel dx="774" dy="471" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
